title: Update module github.com/sigstore/sigstore to v1.10.4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sigstore/sigstore](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore) | `v1.9.6-0.20251111174640-d8ab8afb1326` → `v1.10.4` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2fsigstore/v1.10.4?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2fsigstore/v1.9.6-0.20251111174640-d8ab8afb1326/v1.10.4?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/sigstore (github.com/sigstore/sigstore)</summary>

### [`v1.10.4`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.3...v1.10.4)

#### What's Changed

- Escape target name - GHSA-fcv2-xgw5-pqxf in [#​2265](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2265)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.3...v1.10.4>

### [`v1.10.3`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.2...v1.10.3)

##### What's Changed

v1.10.3 adds `ValidatePubKey` back to the `cryptoutils` package to avoid a breaking API change.

- Add back ValidatePubKey as a deprecated, minimal function in [#​2235](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2235)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sigstore/sigstore/compare/v1.10.2...v1.10.3>

### [`v1.10.2`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.2)

##### v1.10.2

Functionally equivalent to [v1.10.0](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/releases/tag/v1.10.0). v1.10.1 has been retracted to remove copied code.

##### v1.10.0

##### Breaking change

[#​2194](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2194) moves `cryptoutils.ValidatePubKey` to `goodkey.ValidatePubKey` to minimize the dependency tree for clients using the cryptoutils package.

##### Features

- feat(hashivault): token helper in [#​2174](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2174)
- set GoogleAPIClientOption on GCP KMS provider in [#​2128](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2128)

##### Refactoring

- cryptoutils: move goodkey validation to separate package in [#​2194](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2194)
- Stop depending on golang.org/x/crypto for sha3 in [#​2209](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2209)
- remove duplicative dependency for portable browser opener in [#​2178](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2178)
- consolidate deep Equal usage to one library in [#​2177](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2177)
- Drop redundant aws-sdk-go dependency in the e2e kms tests in [#​2172](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/sigstore/pull/2172)

</details>

---
